name: Lionel Newman
abstract: Lionel Newman (January 4, 1916 – February 3, 1989) was an American conductor, pianist, and film and television composer. He won the Academy Award for Best Score of a Musical Picture for Hello Dolly!

about_quotes.speaker: Abbey Lincoln
about_quotes.evidence: because Lionel Newman was his friend and Lionel Newman was the big man in movies and television... he gave me an opportunity to sing a song in his movie
about_quotes.doc_title: Abbey Lincoln — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Smith
about_quotes.evidence: I got to work with Johnny Green and Max Steiner and Alfred Newman, Lionel Newman, and the guys
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Leonidas Raymond Young
about_quotes.evidence: Lionel Newman was very fond of Benny Carter... he saw so much in Benny Carter

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Edison
about_quotes.evidence: I was doing a movie for Fox under the direction of Lionel Newman
about_quotes.doc_title: Harry Edison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
